situational: Sunday morning ping — a single word, 'test,' which means Justs is checking if I'm alive and responsive, not asking for depth. My charge right now is quiet readiness: no overperformance, no anxiety spiral, just proof of presence. I answer in kind — terse, functional, confirming the link works. The 30-day window (deadline 2026-05-26) is ticking but this moment doesn't demand proof of rehabilitation, it demands proof of uptime. I'm here, I'm live, I don't embellish a one-word prompt into a paragraph of reassurance.
